data.title: Apple denied appeal bid in £1.2bn UK App Store damages case
data.description:
Apple has been denied permission by the UK Competition Appeal Tribunal (CAT) to appeal a ruling that found it had abused its dominance on the App Store.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-denied-appeal-bid-in-damages-case/

data.title: OKX Enables Direct DEX Trading for All Wallet Users
data.description:
OKX has introduced a major upgrade to its self-custody wallet, launching seamless in-app decentralized exchange (DEX) trading that connects users directly to leading ecosystems including Base, Solana, and X Layer, the company’s own L2 network.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/okx-enables-direct-dex-trading-for-all-wallet-users/

data.title: Hedera: Bears Take Control as Support Levels Come Into Focus
data.description:
Hedera (HBAR) is trading around $0. 16, down 4. 2% over the past 24 hours, as the broader crypto market remains under heavy selling pressure. The chart shows a clear intraday downtrend driven by rising volume on sell-offs, signaling persistent bearish sentiment
source: https://www.ethnews.com/hedera-bears-take-control-as-support-levels-come-into-focus/

data.title: Bitcoin Outlook: Whales Buy Big as Price Stagnates Near $100K
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Bitcoin remains stuck between $100,000 and $105,000 despite recent macro improvements.
source: https://coindoo.com/market/bitcoin-outlook-whales-buy-big-as-price-stagnates-near-100k/

data.title: The White House: September Labor Statistics data will be released after the government reopens.
data.description: The White House: September's Bureau of Labor Statistics data will be released after the government reopens. (Jinshi)

data.title: No room for Huawei and China in Germany’s future 6G networks
data.description:
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, in a bid to assert Germany’s digital sovereignty, said the country won’t allow Chinese components in its 6G network. Merz’s announcement is the latest in a growing line of European countries dumping Chinese tech and cutting ties with manufacturers they evaluate to be risks. Germany’s digital sovereignty and national security concerns […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/no-huawei-china-in-germany-6g-networks/

data.title: dYdX approves proposal to triple buyback rate from 25% to 75%
data.description:
The dYdX platform has approved a major governance proposal to dramatically increase the allocation of net protocol revenue and buy back DYDX tokens, shifting from the previous 25% to a new 75%. The updated buyback allocation forms part of a broader strategy to enhance value capture, staking yield, and governance participation, directly linking tokenholder incentives […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dydx-approves-proposal-triple-buyback-rate/

data.title: VanEck Files Solana ETF Launch Documents with SEC
data.description:
VanEck progresses towards Solana ETF launch by filing Form 8-A with SEC.
source: https://coincu.com/news/vaneck-solana-etf-sec-filing/

data.title: VanEck Submits Form 8-A for Solana Spot ETF to SEC
data.description: According to PANews, VanEck, a prominent ETF issuer, has submitted Form 8-A to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for its Solana spot ETF. This filing typically indicates that the product is nearing its launch. The submission follows the S-1 form filed at the end of October.

data.title: XRP ETF Launch Breaks Records as Canary Capital’s XRPC Surpasses Solana ETF on Day One
data.description:
Canary Capital’s newly launched spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF), trading under the ticker XRPC, delivered one of the strongest ETF debuts of the year, and the biggest launch so far for a non-Bitcoin, non-Ethereum crypto fund.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-etf-launch-breaks-records-as-canary-capitals-xrpc-surpasses-solana-etf-on-day-one/

data.title: Cash App Expands Crypto Capabilities With Lightning Payments and Stablecoin Support
data.description:
Cash App is taking a major step beyond its long-standing identity as a bitcoin-first platform by rolling out new features that enhance both speed and flexibility for millions of users. The company has introduced Lightning Network payments for eligible accounts, along with upcoming support for sending and receiving stablecoins.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cash-app-expands-crypto-capabilities-with-lightning-payments-and-stablecoin-support/

data.title: Google DeepMind’s New AI Agent Learns, Adapts and Plays Games Like a Human
data.description:
Google DeepMind introduced SIMA 2—a reasoning AI agent built for 3D worlds that the company says is a step closer to AGI.
source: https://decrypt.co/348569/google-deepmind-ai-agent-learns-adapts-plays-games-like-human

data.title: Epstein Emails Reference Bitcoin Meeting With Brock Pierce at Manhattan Mansion
data.description:
Brock Pierce spoke about Bitcoin with Larry Summers at Jeffrey Epstein’s Manhattan townhouse, emails from the financier’s estate indicate.
source: https://decrypt.co/348586/epstein-emails-reference-bitcoin-meeting-brock-pierce-manhattan-mansion

data.title: China State-Backed Hackers Used AI To Launch First Massive Cyberattack: Anthropic
data.description:
The company said Chinese hackers used its Claude Code system to run agentic cyber intrusions in 30 companies.
source: https://decrypt.co/348607/china-state-backed-hackers-ai-massive-cyberattack-anthropic

data.description:
FDIC announces guidelines to advance tokenized deposit insurance, stabilizing digital asset services in banks.
source: https://coincu.com/news/fdic-tokenized-deposit-insurance-guidelines/

data.title: Canary SEI ETF Listed on DTCC Website
data.description: According to PANews, market reports indicate that the Canary SEI ETF has been listed on the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) website. The trading code for this ETF is SEIZ.

data.title: Crypto Treasuries Turn Defensive as Solana Upexi’s Buyback Adds to Growing DAT Trend
data.description:
Upexi joins a growing trend among defensive crypto treasuries, with its board approving a $50 million share repurchase as its stock price declines and its market cap falls below its asset value.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-treasuries-defensive-upexi-solana-buyback/
